title: More Menu
heading: Right to Information
text:
# Right to Information

Citizen can apply for information under RTI Act in the DM Office of West District. The citizen can apply online in the eDistrict Portal also
**Visit** :

## Office of the DM & Collector

Judicial Section, DM Complex DM & Collector, West Tripura
**Location** : DM & Collector Office,Office Lane | **City** : Agartala
**Phone** : 0381-232514 | **Email** : dmwest[dot]trp[at]nic[dot]in
